name: SignatureGateway

methods.name: pendingOwner
methods.desc: @dev Returns the address of the pending owner.

methods.name: transferOwnership
acceptOwnership
methods.desc: @dev The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

methods.name: owner
methods.desc: @dev Returns the address of the current owner.

methods.name: renounceOwnership
methods.desc:
@dev Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call
 `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner.
 NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner,
 thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.
